title: Support Worker
description:
We are looking for warm, reliable and proactive Support Workers to join our team in Sheffield to provide quality care and support to individuals with learning disabilities and mental health needs.

Your role will include:

- Providing respectful personal care and emotional support,

- Supporting individuals with daily living activities,

- Encouraging service users to engage with their local community,

- Promoting independence and choice in all aspects of life.

You will be part of a supportive team environment and will receive full training and ongoing development opportunities.

Vacancy Reference Number: 81234
Applications must be submitted via the Creative Support website.
summary: Support Worker role in Sheffield supporting adults with learning disabilities.

title: Care Assistant
description:
We are currently recruiting Care Assistants in Sheffield to support vulnerable adults.

Duties include:

- Assisting with personal care,

- Supporting daily routines,

- Providing companionship and emotional support.

Previous care experience is required and flexibility is essential.
summary: Care Assistant role in Sheffield supporting vulnerable adults.

title: Behaviour Support Worker
company: Veritas Education Recruitment Ltd • Agency • Contract
description:

Experience with SEMH is essential.
summary: Behaviour Support Worker role in Rotherham supporting SEMH pupils.
